title: Coord inbox message
description: One append-only line in inbox/<to>.jsonl, written by `coord send`. A message is stale (skipped by checkpoint/inbox) when its TTL has expired OR its `as_of` is older than the current desired-state version.

seq.description: Monotonic sequence (time.time_ns) used as the per-recipient inbox cursor.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the message was queued.

to.description: Recipient session id (names the inbox file).

as_of.description: The desired-state version this message assumed; if less than the current version the message is stale. Null means version-independent.

expires.description: Epoch seconds after which the message is stale, or null for no TTL.
